'''Ladarra''' was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] along the [[Pinooran Spur/Legends|Pinooran Spur]]. It was the location of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] colony of [[New Hope Settlement]]. The planet was colonized during the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] and ended up becoming a failed [[Chromium/Legends|chromium]] mine. By the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the planet's people were dying out. All that was left were poor farmers, hermits and fugitives,<ref name="TEA" /> as well as some dust balls from the rust-[[Color/Legends|colored]] desert.

==History==
The only incident of note in the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was when [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] came to settle some personal business in [[The Ellstree Bar]], with the [[Rivo Xarran|Storyteller]]. The Storyteller was an old [[Bounty/Legends|mark]] who fled here to escape him and took a new identity to entertain kids. One day, the day Fett came, the Storyteller told the kids his experiences with Fett.
